title: Filter
description: An expression to filter dimension or metric values.

fieldName.description: The dimension name or metric name. In most methods, dimensions & metrics can be used for the first time in this field. However in a RunPivotReportRequest, this field must be additionally specified by name in the RunPivotReportRequest's dimensions or metrics.

inListFilter.description: A filter for in list values.

numericFilter.description: A filter for numeric or date values.
